title: KB Entry Vetted
description: Emitted by kb vet when an EvidenceEntry is appended to a vault entry's evidence_chain. The highest-confidence write event kb produces — source_type test-result maps to confidence 1.0 in the scoring model.

entry_id.description: UUID v7 of the vault entry

project.description: Primary project namespace of the entry

evidence_chain_len.description: Total entries in evidence_chain after this write
